theme: 國際商務出差與行程安排
passages: On January 15, Vikram Patel began finalizing the agenda for next week’s meetings with government officials, ensuring that all logistics for the delegation were ______ in advance.

questions.question: On January 15, Vikram Patel began finalizing the agenda for next week’s meetings with government officials, ensuring that all logistics for the delegation were ______ in advance.

options.A: coordinated
options.B: interrupted
options.C: abandoned
options.D: exceeded

questions.explanation: 選項 A (coordinated) 意為「協調、安排」，符合商務行程 Logistics (後勤/物流) 的搭配詞。B 為中斷，C 為拋棄，D 為超過，皆不符合語境。

passages: On October 6, Amara Diallo introduced new production methods at the assembly plant to minimize waste and enhance product value, emphasizing that all staff must strictly adhere to the updated safety protocols to ensure the project's success.

questions.question: Amara Diallo stressed that all employees must ______ to the updated safety protocols to ensure the integrity of the new production methods implemented on October 6.

options.A: adhere
options.B: prohibit
options.C: convince
options.D: revert

questions.explanation: adhere to 為多益高頻片語，意為「遵守」。句意為「Amara Diallo 強調所有員工必須遵守更新後的安全規範，以確保新生產方法的完整性。」

questions.question: On January 28, Plant Manager Oliver Sterling announced that the facility would adopt innovative protocols to ______ food processing byproducts into reusable organic materials, thereby reducing overall waste.

options.A: convert
options.B: distribute
options.C: withhold
options.D: abandon

questions.explanation: 題目中提到將食品加工副產品「轉化」為可再利用的有機材料。A選項 convert (轉化/轉換) 符合語意。B選項 distribute (分發)，C選項 withhold (扣留)，D選項 abandon (放棄) 皆不符合生產線維護與再利用的情境。

theme: 辦公室日常與人事公告

questions.question: On January 22, Amara Diallo issued a formal statement explaining that the board of directors has decided ______ several underperforming retail locations to navigate the current market challenges.

options.A: closing
options.B: to close
options.C: close
options.D: closed

questions.explanation: 本題考查不定詞的用法。動詞 decide 後面必須接不定詞 (to + V) 作為受詞，因此正確答案為 to close。翻譯：1月22日，Amara Diallo 發布了一份正式聲明，說明董事會已決定關閉幾家績效不佳的零售店，以應對當前的市場挑戰。

theme: 辦公室日常與人事公告

questions.question: On April 19, Kenji Tanaka issued a formal statement explaining that the charity has decided ______ a significant number of its retail shops due to the ongoing economic downturn.

options.A: closing
options.B: to close
options.C: close
options.D: of closing

questions.explanation: 本題考查動詞 decide 的用法。decide 後面必須接不定詞 (to V) 作為受詞，表示「決定做某事」。因此，to close 是正確選項。

theme: 廠房公安與生產線維護

questions.question: On April 18, Kenji Tanaka announced the permanent closure of the pottery factory, noting that the staff members were visibly ______ by the sudden news of the production cessation.

options.A: shock
options.B: shocking
options.C: shocked
options.D: shocks

questions.explanation: 本題考查分詞當形容詞的使用。當分詞修飾人（staff members）的主觀感受時，應使用過去分詞 (p.p.) 表示「感到……的」。因此，shocked（感到震驚的）符合句意，而 shocking 則是用來修飾令人震驚的事物。

theme: 辦公室新進員工經驗分享
passages: January 24: During the onboarding session, Oliver Sterling remarked that his refined approach to networking was _______ effective than the traditional methods he used in his previous role.

questions.question: During the onboarding session, Oliver Sterling remarked that his refined approach to networking was ______ effective than the traditional methods he used in his previous role.

options.A: very
options.B: much more
options.C: the most
options.D: too much

questions.explanation: 本題考查比較級的修飾語。句中出現了 'than'，因此必須使用比較級 'more effective'。'much' 是用來修飾比較級的副詞，表示程度上的強調（更有效得多）。A選項用於原級，C選項為最高級，D選項語意不符且無法修飾形容詞。

theme: 飲料公司產品召回通知

questions.question: On January 19, Chloe Laurent issued a formal apology to customers after the company received several ______ reports regarding the safety of the seasonal fruit juice line.

options.A: disturb
options.B: disturbing
options.C: disturbed
options.D: disturbingly

questions.explanation: 本題考查分詞作為形容詞的用法。空格處需修飾名詞 reports。disturbing（令人不安的）用於描述事物本身具有的特性，而 disturbed（感到不安的）則用於描述人的感受。在此情境下，關於產品安全問題的報告是「令人不安的」，故選 (B)。

theme: 國際商務出差與行程安排

questions.question: Regarding the national AI investment summit on April 15, Nolan Ross suggested that the delegation ______ the official agenda to include a discussion on ethical framework regulations.

options.A: reviews
options.B: reviewed
options.C: review
options.D: will review

questions.explanation: 本題考點為動詞 suggest 後的子句用法。當 suggest (建議) 後接 that 子句時，子句內的動詞需使用「原形動詞」，因為這是一個隱含的虛擬語氣（省略了 should）。因此，正確答案為 review。

theme: Corporate Restructuring and Store Closures Announcement
passages:
To: All Staff
From: Fiona Gallagher, Chief Operations Officer
Date: October 21
Subject: Important Update Regarding Company Operations

Dear Team,

I am writing to share some difficult news regarding our operational strategy. Due to persistent market challenges and shifts in consumer behavior, the company has made the decision to undergo a significant restructuring. As part of this process, we will be closing fifteen of our underperforming retail locations by the end of the year. 

Chloe Laurent, our HR Director, will be reaching out individually to all employees affected by these closures. We are committed to providing comprehensive transition support, including severance packages and job placement assistance. We understand this is a challenging time, and we appreciate your continued dedication during this transition. Please direct any immediate concerns to your department heads.

Sincerely,
Fiona Gallagher
Chief Operations Officer

questions.question: What is the primary reason for the company's decision to close stores?

options.A: A change in senior management
options.B: Challenges in the current market
options.C: A lack of qualified applicants
options.D: A disagreement between Fiona Gallagher and Chloe Laurent

questions.explanation: 文章中明確提到是因為 market challenges (市場挑戰) 以及消費者行為的轉變，導致公司必須進行營運調整與關閉門市。

questions.question: What role does Chloe Laurent play in this transition?

options.A: She is responsible for selecting the stores to be closed.
options.B: She is in charge of drafting the new market strategy.
options.C: She will contact employees impacted by the closures.
options.D: She will take over as the new Chief Operations Officer.

questions.explanation: 信件中提到 Chloe Laurent 是 HR Director，並且會個別聯繫受影響的員工 (reaching out individually to all employees affected)。

questions.question: According to the announcement, what can affected employees expect?

options.A: They will be transferred to new offices by October 21.
options.B: They will receive support such as severance packages.
options.C: They must submit their resignation letters to Fiona Gallagher.
options.D: They will be given an immediate pay raise for their work.

questions.explanation: 信中提到公司將提供全面性的轉職協助，包括資遣費 (severance packages) 與就業安置協助。

theme: Business Travel Itinerary and Meeting Coordination
passages:
Subject: Urgent: Finalization of Government Meeting Itinerary for July 21

Dear Chloe Laurent,

I hope this email finds you well. As we prepare for a series of high-level meetings with key government officials next week, I have reviewed the current schedule. Given that our primary briefing is set for July 21, it is imperative that we finalize the logistics by the end of this business day.

David Vance has requested an additional pre-meeting session at the Ministry of Finance to ensure our presentation materials align with the latest regulatory updates. Could you please confirm if the ministry’s conference room is available at 9:00 AM on that morning? Furthermore, please ensure that all transportation arrangements for David Vance are secured, as he will be arriving directly from the airport. If there are any conflicts with the existing agenda, kindly propose an alternative slot before 2:00 PM.

Best regards,

Operations Department

questions.question: What is the primary objective of the email?

options.A: To request a leave of absence for David Vance.
options.B: To coordinate logistics for upcoming government meetings on July 21.
options.C: To update the company on new regulatory changes.
options.D: To cancel the meetings with government officials.

questions.explanation: 信件開頭明確指出目的是為了準備下週與政府官員的高層會議，並要求在7月21日之前敲定行程細節。

questions.question: According to the email, what must Chloe Laurent do regarding David Vance's schedule?

options.A: Accompany him to the airport upon his arrival.
options.B: Draft a new presentation for the Ministry of Finance.
options.C: Confirm the availability of a conference room and arrange his transportation.
options.D: Reschedule all meetings to a later date after July 21.

questions.explanation: 信中要求 Chloe 確認財政部的會議室預約，並確保 David Vance 從機場出發後的交通安排。

passages:
To: All Staff
From: Chloe Laurent, Director of Operations
Date: October 23
Subject: Important Update Regarding Retail Operations

Dear Team,

It is with a heavy heart that I must announce significant changes to our retail footprint. Due to the ongoing challenging economic conditions and rising operational costs, the Board of Directors has made the difficult decision to close 15 of our charity shops across the region by the end of the year. 

Vikram Patel, our Head of Human Resources, will be hosting a series of town hall meetings starting next week to discuss the impact on our staff. We understand that this news is unsettling, and we are committed to providing support, including career counseling and relocation assistance for those affected by these closures. 

We would like to thank our dedicated employees for their tireless commitment to our mission. Further details regarding the specific locations affected will be released on our internal portal on October 25. Please direct any immediate inquiries to the HR department.

Sincerely,
Chloe Laurent

questions.question: What is the primary reason for the decision mentioned in the announcement?

options.A: A decline in the number of volunteers.
options.B: A need to renovate existing charity shops.
options.C: Adverse economic circumstances.
options.D: A change in the company's long-term mission.

questions.explanation: 文章中提到 'Due to the ongoing challenging economic conditions'，因此正確答案為 C。

questions.question: What is Vikram Patel's role in the transition process?

options.A: He is responsible for selecting the shops to be closed.
options.B: He will manage the communication and support for affected employees.
options.C: He is in charge of drafting the new budget for the charity.
options.D: He will oversee the liquidation of store inventory.

questions.explanation: 文章提到 Vikram Patel 將舉辦說明會並討論對員工的影響，提供職業諮詢等協助，故選 B。

questions.question: When can employees expect to see the list of shops slated for closure?

options.A: October 23
options.B: October 25
options.C: Next week
options.D: At the end of the year

questions.explanation: 文章明確指出 'Further details regarding the specific locations affected will be released on our internal portal on October 25'。

theme: 廠房公安與生產線維護：食品加工副產品再利用計畫
passages:
To: All Production Staff
From: Fiona Gallagher, Operations Manager
Date: January 3
Subject: Implementation of New Waste Management Protocols

Dear Team,

Following our quarterly safety audit, we are introducing updated procedures for the handling of factory floor debris. As we continue to optimize our operational efficiency, Kenji Tanaka from the Engineering Department has finalized the integration of a new filtration system. This system is crucial because new methods are being implemented to repurpose food processing byproducts efficiently, rather than disposing of them as standard waste.

While these new methods will significantly reduce our environmental footprint, they require strict adherence to safety protocols. Please be advised that the designated collection zones near the main conveyor belts have been relocated. Starting tomorrow, all staff must wear specialized slip-resistant gear when working in these areas, as the byproduct material can create slick surfaces if not managed correctly. Failure to comply with these safety measures will result in immediate suspension from the production floor.

Thank you for your cooperation in making our facility safer and more sustainable.

Best regards,
Fiona Gallagher

questions.question: What is the primary reason for the shift in how the factory handles its waste?

options.A: To comply with new government environmental regulations.
options.B: To repurpose food processing byproducts efficiently.
options.C: To reduce the workload of the Engineering Department.
options.D: To replace the outdated conveyor belts in the facility.

questions.explanation: 文章中明確提到「new methods are being implemented to repurpose food processing byproducts efficiently」，故選B。

questions.question: What does Fiona Gallagher require from the staff starting on January 4?

options.A: They must attend a safety training session led by Kenji Tanaka.
options.B: They must report all byproduct spills to the Engineering Department.
options.C: They must wear specific footwear to prevent slipping in collection zones.
options.D: They must relocate their workstations to the main assembly area.

questions.explanation: 信件提到「all staff must wear specialized slip-resistant gear when working in these areas」，對應選項C的防滑裝備要求。

theme: 廠房公安與生產線維護：陶藝廠停產公告
passages:
To: All Staff
From: Oliver Sterling, Plant Manager
Date: April 23
Subject: Official Notice of Production Cessation

It is with a heavy heart that I announce the complete cessation of all production operations at Sterling Pottery, effective immediately. Following the recent safety inspection conducted by Kenji Tanaka, our lead maintenance engineer, it has been determined that the aging kiln ventilation systems no longer meet modern safety standards. 

Despite our best efforts to upgrade the machinery, the structural integrity of the factory floor has deteriorated to a point where continued operation poses a significant risk to employee safety. Consequently, all production lines will be powered down by the end of this business day. Mr. Tanaka will be on-site tomorrow morning to oversee the secure decommissioning of the heavy equipment. All employees are required to attend a briefing in the main warehouse at 9:00 AM on April 24 regarding severance packages and transition support. Thank you for your years of dedication.

questions.question: What is the primary reason for the sudden closure of the factory?

options.A: A decline in the demand for pottery products.
options.B: The retirement of the lead maintenance engineer.
options.C: Safety concerns regarding machinery and infrastructure.
options.D: A scheduled relocation to a new industrial zone.

questions.explanation: 文章提到是由於 Kenji Tanaka 檢查後發現通風系統不符標準，且廠房地板結構已惡化，對員工安全造成重大風險，因此決定停產。

questions.question: What task is Kenji Tanaka scheduled to perform on April 24?

options.A: Conducting a follow-up safety inspection.
options.B: Supervising the shutdown of heavy machinery.
options.C: Distributing severance packages to the staff.
options.D: Leading a meeting about the company's future.

questions.explanation: 文中指出 Kenji Tanaka 將於隔天（4月24日）到場，負責監督重型設備的安全除役（decommissioning）工作。

passages:
[DOC 1] Internal Memo
To: All Production Staff
From: Amara Diallo, Operations Manager
Date: April 7
Subject: Implementation of New Production Protocols

Starting next week, our facility will transition to new production methods designed to minimize waste and enhance overall product value. While these changes are essential for our competitiveness, safety remains our top priority. All assembly line operators must attend a mandatory safety briefing on April 10 to learn how to operate the updated machinery without compromising workstation safety. Please ensure that all maintenance logs are updated by the end of this shift to reflect the current status of the equipment before the transition begins.

[DOC 2] Email
From: Simon de Almeida <s.dealmeida@factory.corp>
To: Amara Diallo <a.diallo@factory.corp>
Date: April 7
Subject: Re: Implementation of New Production Protocols

Dear Amara,

Thank you for the update regarding the new production methods. I have reviewed the proposed workflow, and it certainly seems efficient. However, I am concerned about the maintenance schedule for the hydraulic presses. The current maintenance logs indicate that these machines require a specialized calibration process that might conflict with the new speed settings. Could we potentially move the safety briefing to the morning of April 11 instead? This would allow my team extra time on the 10th to complete the necessary adjustments to the machinery, ensuring we do not violate any safety protocols during the testing phase.

Best regards,
Simon de Almeida
Maintenance Supervisor

questions.question: What is the primary reason for the changes mentioned in the memo?

options.A: To reduce labor costs across the factory.
options.B: To minimize waste and improve product value.
options.C: To comply with new government safety regulations.
options.D: To replace the current maintenance staff.

questions.explanation: 根據 DOC 1 第一句，新方法是為了減少浪費並提升產品價值。

questions.question: When must the production staff complete their maintenance logs according to Amara Diallo?

options.A: By the end of the shift on April 7.
options.B: Before the safety briefing on April 10.
options.C: On the morning of April 11.
options.D: Before the new production methods are implemented next week.

questions.explanation: DOC 1 指出員工需在當班結束前更新維護日誌。

questions.question: Why does Simon de Almeida request a change to the safety briefing schedule?

options.A: He will be out of the office on April 10.
options.B: The staff has requested more time for training.
options.C: He needs more time to calibrate the machinery safely.
options.D: The hydraulic presses are currently broken.

questions.explanation: DOC 2 中 Simon 表示需要時間調整機器（calibration），以確保不違反安全規範。

questions.question: What is implied about the relationship between the two documents?

options.A: Simon is challenging Amara's authority as manager.
options.B: The implementation of new methods requires coordination between operations and maintenance.
options.C: The safety briefing has already been canceled by Amara.
options.D: The maintenance logs are currently missing from the factory records.

questions.explanation: 兩篇文章顯示運營部門的變更需要維護部門的配合與專業評估，體現了跨部門協調的重要性。

theme: 辦公室日常與人事公告：新進員工經驗分享
passages:
[DOC 1] MEMORANDUM
To: All Staff
From: HR Department
Date: April 25
Subject: Welcome New Team Members and Career Workshop

We are pleased to announce that Kenji Tanaka and Nolan Ross have officially joined our marketing division starting today. To foster professional development, the company will host a session on May 5 where Kenji and Nolan will share strategies for successful job applications and career advancement. Having recently navigated our rigorous recruitment process, they are eager to provide insights into how to stand out in a competitive market. All junior staff members are encouraged to attend and learn from their recent experiences.

[DOC 2] EMAIL
From: Sarah Jenkins
To: Kenji Tanaka; Nolan Ross
Date: April 25
Subject: Re: Welcome to the team!

Dear Kenji and Nolan,

Welcome aboard! I am particularly interested in the upcoming workshop. I have been with the firm for two years and am looking to move into a senior role. Could you please clarify if the session on May 5 will cover internal promotion strategies, or will it focus strictly on external job applications? I want to make sure I prepare the right questions. Also, I noticed on your profiles that you both come from diverse backgrounds—do you suggest focusing on soft skills or technical certifications for advancement? Looking forward to your input.

Best regards,
Sarah Jenkins
Marketing Associate

questions.question: What is the primary purpose of the workshop mentioned in both documents?

options.A: To review the performance of current staff
options.B: To discuss strategies for career growth and job application success
options.C: To train new hires on company software
options.D: To announce the resignation of senior management

questions.explanation: 兩篇文章皆提到該研討會旨在分享求職策略與職業晉升的經驗。

questions.question: When did Kenji Tanaka and Nolan Ross officially start their new positions?

options.A: April 25
options.B: May 5
options.C: Two years ago
options.D: They have not started yet

questions.explanation: DOC 1 明確指出他們於 April 25 正式加入公司。

questions.question: What is Sarah Jenkins's specific goal for attending the workshop?

options.A: To welcome the new hires to the office
options.B: To apply for an external job opening
options.C: To seek advice on how to secure a senior position within the company
options.D: To complain about the company's recruitment process

questions.explanation: Sarah 在郵件中提到她已任職兩年，希望能轉任資深職位 (senior role)。

questions.question: Which of the following can be inferred about the workshop?

options.A: It is mandatory for all employees
options.B: It will be held in the marketing department's conference room
options.C: It is open to junior staff members
options.D: It will focus exclusively on technical certifications

questions.explanation: DOC 1 提到鼓勵所有初階員工 (junior staff) 參加。

questions.question: What does Sarah Jenkins ask the new hires to clarify?

options.A: Whether the workshop will address internal promotions
options.B: The location of the training room
options.C: The reason why they left their previous jobs
options.D: The salary expectations for senior roles

questions.explanation: Sarah 在郵件中詢問該研討會是否會涵蓋內部晉升策略 (internal promotion strategies)。

theme: Product Recall Protocol and Internal Inquiry
passages:
[DOC 1] Internal Memo
To: All Staff
From: Quality Assurance Department
Date: July 24
Subject: URGENT: Product Recall – 'Arctic Fizz' Sparkling Water

It has come to our attention that a batch of 'Arctic Fizz' (Batch #AF-992) may contain minute glass particles due to a malfunctioning capping machine. Effective immediately, all retail partners are to be notified. Please remove these items from shelves and store them in the designated quarantine area in the warehouse. Do not, under any circumstances, issue refunds manually; direct all customer complaints to the centralized customer service portal. We must handle this matter with the utmost discretion to protect the brand's reputation.

[DOC 2] Email
From: Chloe Laurent <c.laurent@beveragecorp.com>
To: Simon de Almeida <s.almeida@beveragecorp.com>
Date: July 24, 2:15 PM
Subject: Re: URGENT: Product Recall – 'Arctic Fizz' Sparkling Water

Hi Simon,

I’ve just received three angry calls from local supermarket managers regarding the recall notice. They are frustrated because the warehouse manager is refusing to accept the returned stock without a specific authorization code that wasn't included in the morning memo. Also, one customer walked into our regional office demanding a cash refund for a case of Batch #AF-992. I turned them away as per the policy, but they are threatening to contact the local newspaper. Should I provide them with the official complaint portal link, or is there a specific protocol for high-profile complaints like this? Please advise as soon as possible.

Best,
Chloe

questions.question: What is the primary reason for the recall of 'Arctic Fizz'?

options.A: The product does not meet taste standards.
options.B: The packaging labels were printed incorrectly.
options.C: There is a risk of glass contamination.
options.D: The product has exceeded its expiration date.

questions.explanation: The memo states the recall is due to 'minute glass particles' caused by a capping machine malfunction.

questions.question: According to the memo, what should employees do with the recalled products?

options.A: Return them to the production line immediately.
options.B: Store them in a designated quarantine area.
options.C: Issue full refunds to customers who return them.
options.D: Dispose of them in the facility's waste containers.

questions.explanation: The memo explicitly instructs staff to 'store them in the designated quarantine area in the warehouse'.

questions.question: What problem is Chloe Laurent reporting to Simon de Almeida?

options.A: The warehouse is refusing to accept returns without an authorization code.
options.B: The customer service portal is currently offline.
options.C: The media has already published an article about the recall.
options.D: She has run out of official complaint forms for the customers.

questions.explanation: Chloe mentions that retail managers are frustrated because the warehouse manager won't accept stock without a specific authorization code.

questions.question: Based on the documents, what is Chloe expected to do when a customer requests a refund?

options.A: Provide a cash refund immediately to prevent bad press.
options.B: Refer the customer to the centralized customer service portal.
options.C: Send the customer to the warehouse to pick up a replacement.
options.D: Ignore the request and wait for further instruction.

questions.explanation: The memo specifies that staff should 'direct all customer complaints to the centralized customer service portal' and not issue manual refunds.

theme: International AI Investment Summit Itinerary Adjustment
passages:
[DOC 1]

October 25 - AI Investment Summit Itinerary
Location: Grand Continental Hotel, Geneva

09:00 - 10:30: Opening Ceremony (Main Hall)
10:45 - 12:30: High-level government meetings to discuss national AI investments (Room 402)
12:30 - 14:00: Networking Luncheon (Garden Terrace)
14:15 - 16:00: Panel Discussion: Ethical AI Frameworks (Room 402)
16:30 - 18:00: Closing Session: Future Infrastructure Projects (Main Hall)

Attendees: Amara Diallo (Chief Delegate), Oliver Sterling (Strategic Advisor)

[DOC 2]

From: Events Coordination Office
To: Amara Diallo, Oliver Sterling
Date: October 25, 08:15
Subject: URGENT: Schedule Update for Today's AI Summit

Dear Ms. Diallo and Mr. Sterling,

Due to unexpected flight delays affecting several key ministers, we have adjusted the schedule for today's session. The high-level government meetings to discuss national AI investments, originally scheduled for 10:45, have been postponed by two hours. 

Consequently, the Networking Luncheon will now begin at 14:30. Please note that the Panel Discussion on Ethical AI Frameworks has been canceled entirely to accommodate the extended morning meetings. The closing session remains unchanged at 16:30. We apologize for any inconvenience caused.

Best regards,
Events Coordination Team

questions.question: What is the primary purpose of the meetings scheduled in Room 402?

options.A: To conduct a training session for new AI developers.
options.B: To discuss national AI investments.
options.C: To review the hotel's infrastructure projects.
options.D: To host a press conference for the general public.

questions.explanation: 根據 DOC 1，Room 402 的會議目的是討論國家級的人工智慧投資 (discuss national AI investments)。

questions.question: At what time is the high-level meeting expected to start according to the update?
questions.explanation: DOC 2 指出原定 10:45 的會議延後兩小時，因此調整為 12:45 開始。

questions.question: Which activity has been removed from the schedule entirely?

options.A: The Opening Ceremony
options.B: The Networking Luncheon
options.C: The Panel Discussion: Ethical AI Frameworks
options.D: The Closing Session

questions.explanation: DOC 2 明確提到 Panel Discussion: Ethical AI Frameworks 已被取消 (canceled entirely)。

questions.question: What is the new starting time for the Networking Luncheon?
questions.explanation: DOC 2 說明 Networking Luncheon 改至 14:30 開始。

questions.question: What is the reason provided for the changes in the schedule?

options.A: Amara Diallo and Oliver Sterling arrived late.
options.B: Technical difficulties with the AI presentation software.
options.C: Unexpected flight delays involving government ministers.
options.D: The Grand Continental Hotel underwent emergency maintenance.

questions.explanation: DOC 2 提到行程變更的原因是關鍵部長們的班機延誤 (unexpected flight delays affecting several key ministers)。
